name: Interdisciplinary Science
note: A minimum cumulative 2.0 GPA is required in all courses counted toward the major. Students earning a major in the Natural Sciences are not eligible for the Interdisciplinary Science major. At least five of the eleven course credits must be above the introductory level.

sections.label: Five Courses in Primary Natural Science Area
sections.description: Five course credits in one of the four natural science areas (biology, chemistry, mathematics, physics).

sections.label: Four Courses in Second Natural Science Field
sections.description: Four course credits in a second natural science field.

sections.label: Two Courses in Third Natural Science Field
sections.description: Two course credits in a third natural science field.
